lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: What to buy? What to buy?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: Oh, hello human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: Only if you can help me make a suggestion on what to buy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I smell a quest!

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: No, not really. I just need some advice on what to buy, that's all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should buy some new clothes. You can't go around town wearing what you're wearing.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: You're right, this is a little drab. I shouldn't really go around Keldagrim-West wearing this, should I?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: Of course I still don't know what colour I should get. I don't want to accidentally offend the wrong company of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should get yourself a big mighty warhammer.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: I don't think so. The warhammer shop is run by the Red Axe. I'd rather stay out of there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't like the Red Axe?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: They're all a lot of bullies if you ask me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I thought they left the city?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: They may have, but I still think that shopkeeper is in league with them, banners or no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Get yourself a long piece of rope.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: What would I do with a rope?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I generally find a rope useful while adventuring.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: I don't do a lot of adventuring to be honest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An oversized hat. In a ridiculous colour.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: No one is selling hats here, that's not a very helpful suggestion at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing. You should buy absolutely nothing.

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: Now that's the best idea I've heard all day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought so! Now why don't you give me some of the money I saved you?

lines.speaker: Odmar
lines.text: No, I don't think so. I think I'd rather buy something with my money after all.
